ABOUT ME ——

Crafting Digital
Worlds With Intent

UI/UX designer building seamless digital experiences where usability meets aesthetics.

I'm Sumegha Sharma, a UI/UX designer shaping seamless web and mobile experiences with a focus on usability, aesthetics, and innovation.

For me, design begins with people—understanding their needs, behaviors, and emotions to create solutions that feel effortless.

Every pixel has purpose. Every interaction tells a story.
